message:
fix: CI/CD stat accuracy — failure details, PR count, avg duration (#8764)

- Failed (24h): shows top failing workflow names (e.g. 'UI/UX Standards (3), Coverage Suite (2)')
- Open PRs: counts from all data sources (flow + failures), not just in-flight
- Avg Duration: uses nightly run intervals from pulse data
- Sublabels provide context instead of generic text

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
